basic_details.job_title: TISS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences, Mumbai (TISS)
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences, Mumbai (TISS) has officially announced the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates holding a First Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including integrated PG degrees, or a Second Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology with a Ph.D. are eligible to submit their applications through Email on or before 19 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including the integrated PG degrees, Second Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including the integrated PG degrees with PhD
qualification.details: First Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including the integrated PG degrees OR Second Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including the integrated PG degrees with PhD.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the TISS Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) position is 19th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) role will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000 plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this government job opportunity?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology, including integrated PG degrees, or a Second Class Post Graduate Degree in Psychology with a PhD.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted telephonically or online.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
